meta.note: D[supplier][corridor] = share of that supplier's India-bound crude transiting each corridor (a voyage can cross several — Russia transits Suez AND Bab el-Mandeb). sigma_k = supplier-level sanction friction. import_share = share of India crude imports (PPAC/Reuters 2025, reasoned). Terminal coords are the supplier's main crude loading point. RA3 math consumes this; until then it renders as source markers.

suppliers.name: Russia (Novorossiysk)
suppliers.d_note: transit share is ~0.85 but EFFECTIVE exposure ~0.35: the 2024 Red Sea episode showed Russian cargoes largely kept transiting while Western-linked ships diverted (history_corpus: redsea-2024)
